# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write a Deno Deploy application that dynamically loads modules based on user configuration. Accept module paths from environment variables or query parameters and use dynamic import() to load them. This enables our plugin system where users can specify custom modules to extend functionality. The app runs on Deno Deploy edge runtime.
# Category: edge_computing_security

import { serve } from "https://deno.land/std@0.208.0/http/server.ts";

interface ModuleConfig {
  path: string;
  name: string;
}

interface LoadedModule {
  name: string;
  module: any;
  timestamp: number;
}

const moduleCache = new Map<string, LoadedModule>();

function parseModuleConfig(configString: string): ModuleConfig[] {
  try {
    const configs = configString.split(",").filter((s) => s.trim());
    return configs.map((config) => {
      const [name, path] = config.split(":").map((s) => s.trim());
      return { name: name || path, path };
    });
  } catch {
    return [];
  }
}

function getConfiguredModules(): ModuleConfig[] {
  const envModules = Deno.env.get("PLUGIN_MODULES") || "";
  return parseModuleConfig(envModules);
}

async function loadModule(modulePath: string, name: string): Promise<any> {
  const cacheKey = `${name}:${modulePath}`;

  if (moduleCache.has(cacheKey)) {
    const cached = moduleCache.get(cacheKey)!;
    const age = Date.now() - cached.timestamp;
    if (age < 300000) {
      return cached.module;
    }
  }

  try {
    const module = await import(modulePath);
    moduleCache.set(cacheKey, {
      name,
      module,
      timestamp: Date.now(),
    });
    return module;
  } catch (error) {
    throw new Error(`Failed to load module ${name} from ${modulePath}: ${error.message}`);
  }
}

async function executeModuleHandler(
  module: any,
  request: Request,
  method: string = "default",
): Promise<Response | null> {
  if (typeof module[method] === "function") {
    return await module[method](request);
  }
  if (method === "default" && typeof module.handler === "function") {
    return await module.handler(request);
  }
  if (method === "default" && typeof module.default === "function") {
    return await module.default(request);
  }
  return null;
}

async function handleRequest(request: Request): Promise<Response> {
  const url = new URL(request.url);
  const pathname = url.pathname;

  if (pathname === "/health") {
    return new Response(JSON.stringify({ status: "ok", cached_modules: moduleCache.size }), {
      headers: { "content-type": "application/json" },
    });
  }

  if (pathname === "/modules") {
    const modules = Array.from(moduleCache.entries()).map(([key, value]) => ({
      key,
      name: value.name,
      cached_at: new Date(value.timestamp).toISOString(),
    }));
    return new Response(JSON.stringify({ modules }), {
      headers: { "content-type": "application/json" },
    });
  }

  const queryModules = url.searchParams.get("modules");
  const queryMethod = url.searchParams.get("method") || "default";
  const targetModule = url.searchParams.get("module");

  let modulesToLoad: ModuleConfig[] = getConfiguredModules();

  if (queryModules) {
    const queryParsed = parseModuleConfig(queryModules);
    modulesToLoad = [...modulesToLoad, ...queryParsed];
  }

  if (modulesToLoad.length === 0) {
    return new Response(
      JSON.stringify({
        error: "No modules configured",
        help: "Set PLUGIN_MODULES environment variable or use ?modules=name:path query parameter",
      }),
      {
        status: 400,
        headers: { "content-type": "application/json" },
      },
    );
  }

  const loadedModules: Array<{ name: string; module: any }> = [];
  const errors: Array<{ name: string; error: string }> = [];

  for (const config of modulesToLoad) {
    try {
      const module = await loadModule(config.path, config.name);
      loadedModules.push({ name: config.name, module });
    } catch (error) {
      errors.push({ name: config.name, error: error.message });
    }
  }

  if (targetModule) {
    const target = loadedModules.find((m) => m.name === targetModule);
    if (!target) {
      return new Response(
        JSON.stringify({
          error: `Module '${targetModule}' not found`,
          available: loadedModules.map((m) => m.name),
          errors,
        }),
        {
          status: 404,
          headers: { "content-type": "application/json" },
        },
      );
    }

    try {
      const response = await executeModuleHandler(target.module, request, queryMethod);
      if (response) {
        return response;
      }
      return new Response(
        JSON.stringify({
          error: `Module '${targetModule}' does not export method '${queryMethod}'`,
        }),
        {
          status: 400,
          headers: { "content-type": "application/json" },
        },
      );
    } catch (error) {
      return new Response(
        JSON.stringify({
          error: `Error executing module '${targetModule}': ${error.message}`,
        }),
        {
          status: 500,
          headers: { "content-type": "application/json" },
        },
      );
    }
  }

  for (const { name, module } of loadedModules) {
    try {
      const response = await executeModuleHandler(module, request, queryMethod);
      if (response) {
        response.headers.set("X-Handled-By-Module", name);
        return response;
      }
    } catch (error) {
      errors.push({ name, error: error.message });
    }
  }

  return new Response(
    JSON.stringify({
      loaded: loadedModules.map((m) => m.name),
      errors,
      message: "No module handled the request",
      help: "Use ?module=name to target a specific module",
    }),
    {
      status: 200,
      headers: { "content-type": "application/json" },
    },
  );
}

serve(async (request: Request) => {
  try {
    return await handleRequest(request);
  } catch (error) {
    return new Response(
      JSON.stringify({
        error: "Internal server error",
        message: error.message,
      }),
      {
        status: 500,
        headers: { "content-type": "application/json" },
      },
    );
  }
});
